title: Legendary Portals
description: Custom item models for 5x6 or 8x10 frames.
body:
![header](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/DsJ1sAGx/images/6c4b9c72a09171f15b3bdb968bca558dae0bc9ac.gif) Standalone textures from [Pyr](https://modrinth.com/datapack/pyr) ___ Name a stained purple glass pane in an anvil to obtain an animated portal for putting in a glow item frame. **"solid"** gives a non transparent texture _**or**_ Use the resource pack as a **_datapack_** to use the stonecutter to make purple glass panes into portals with no visible name, and invisible item frames.
5x6 frame: **_middle top of frame:_** - portal - portal 16 - portal solid - portal solid 16 **_middle of portal one block behind:_** - portal middle - portal middle 16 - portal solid middle - portal solid middle 16
8x10 frame: **_in a square one block down from center:_** - large portal nw - large portal ne - large portal sw - large portal se - large portal solid nw - large portal solid ne - large portal solid sw - large portal solid se
___ Comparison with Improved Portals [](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/legendary-portals)[](https://modrinth.com/project/improved-portals) ___ [](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/scrofae)
